server_url.description: Tableau Server or Tableau Cloud base URL, such as https://10ax.online.tableau.com.

site_content_url.description: Optional Tableau site content URL. Leave blank for the default Tableau Server site.

auth_method.description: Authentication method used by the Tableau action.

pat_name.description: Personal access token name used for Tableau PAT authentication.

page_size.description: Tableau REST API page size for content listings.

max_results.description: Maximum content items returned to an agent call.

use_server_version.description: Allow Tableau Server Client to negotiate the REST API version with the server.
